name: ub-ar-application
description: Web-based Augmented Reality application with image tracking using MindAR and Three.js

scripts.build: npm run minify:js && npm run minify:css
scripts.minify:js: terser main.js -o main.min.js -c -m && terser js/video-manager.js -o js/video-manager.min.js -c -m && terser js/ar-recorder.js -o js/ar-recorder.min.js -c -m && terser js/touch-interface.js -o js/touch-interface.min.js -c -m
scripts.optimize:models: echo 'Place gltf-pipeline commands here for your specific models'

author: Michael Conroy
